item.title: Version 2.7.13
item.description:
Version 2.7.13

  • Fix remaining macOS undo and focus-mode CloudKit sync issues
    • \n

item.title: Version 2.7.12
item.description:
Version 2.7.12

  • CloudKit sync durability fixes and deletion edge-case hardening
    • \n

item.title: Version 2.7.9
item.description:
Version 2.7.9

  • Fix: iOS settings persistence when iCloud is unavailable (including simulator reinstall/dev testing)
  • Fix: iOS priority reordering behavior and animation parity with desktop when auto-sort by priority is enabled
  • Update: settings labels to “Eat the Frog” and “Eisenhower Matrix”

item.title: Version 2.7.3
item.description:
Version 2.7.3

  • Fix: CloudKit save batching for large task counts

item.title: Version 2.7.2
item.description:
Version 2.7.2

  • Fix: CloudKit sync reliability and migration ordering
  • Enhanced sync diagnostics with Copy Log

item.title: Version 2.7.0
item.description:
Version 2.7.0

  • Feature: Eat the Frog daily picking flow
  • Feature: Configurable day start hour
  • Fix: Frog styling properly gated behind setting

item.title: Version 2.6.5
item.description:
Version 2.6.5

  • CloudKit sync with KVS fallback for reliability

item.title: Version 2.6.4
item.description:
Version 2.6.4

  • Fix: iCloud sync from mobile to desktop

item.title: Version 2.5.0
item.description:
Version 2.5.0

  • Breaking out Drawer from main WIndow
  • Caching compted values
  • Small performance fix
  • Performance opps + setting for priority task styling

item.title: Version 2.4.0
item.description:
Version 2.4.0

  • Fix: LIst view window rounding bug
  • Fix: Don’t change task priority when auto-ordering is disabled
  • Confirm deletion of recurring task templates

item.title: Version 2.3.0
item.description:
Version 2.3.0

  • Feature: Right click + inline task editing options
  • Fix: Don’t auto-open calendar event description links

item.title: Version 2.2.0
item.description:
Version 2.2.0

  • Fix: Unfocus list tasks when clicking in drawer
  • New Settings Page UI

item.title: Version 2.1.0
item.description:
Version 2.1.0

  • Fix: Completed list performance issues
  • Feature: Celebration emojis + full-screen text!

item.title: Version 2.0.0
item.description:
Version 2.0.0

  • Fix: Eisenhower UI fixes
  • Fix: Mark Github PR’s complete if reviewed outside of speed mode
  • Fix: Eisenhower Matrix settings UI
  • Fix: Open task links when skipping
  • Fix: iCloud Sync Race Conditions
  • Feature: Eisenhower Matrix!!
  • Feature: Stats page list filter

item.title: Version 1.24.0
item.description:
Version 1.24.0

  • Fix: Deleting recurring tasks did not respawn

item.title: Version 1.23.0
item.description:
Version 1.23.0

  • Feature: Schedule task for ‘This Evening’
  • Fix: Quick Add still focusing List View

item.title: Version 1.22.0
item.description:
Version 1.22.0

  • Fix: Graphite syncing + small fixes
  • Improvement: Frog + Priority setting for Recurring Tasks
  • Fix: Move scheduled tasks to Today on app-focus

item.title: Version 1.21.0
item.description:
Version 1.21.0

  • New Shortcut: CMD + Opt + T to go to ‘Today’ list
  • Improvement: Apple Reminders import notes + subtasks too
  • Fix: Always select task below when task leaves a list
  • Improvement: Hide past days in taks scheduler popup
  • Fix: Dragging tasks while frog task is active
  • Feature: Github repo-level list selection
  • Improvement: Better Quick-Add controls for when/list/priority

item.title: Version 1.20.0
item.description:
Version 1.20.0

  • Fix: Prize Counter Improvements
  • Feature: Prize Counter!
  • Fix: Animate scheduled + deleting tasks
  • Fix: Subtask checks not saving

item.title: Version 1.17.5
item.description:
Version 1.17.5

  • Small fix
  • Fix: Search taks highlighting + selecting
  • Fix: Recent Reminders overwriting older ones

item.title: Version 1.17.0
item.description:
Version 1.17.0

  • Fix: Recurring task bug
  • Feature: Task Time Parsing
  • Fix: iCloud Sync / Reminders collision
